notes: The Wireless GO II is a 2-TX + 1-RX dual-channel wireless microphone system. Each of the two TX transmitters has a 3.5mm TRS input for external mics (with plug-in power) and a USB-C port for charging/firmware. The RX receiver has a 3.5mm TRS analog output and a USB-C port that doubles as a 24-bit/48kHz digital audio interface output and charging port. All USB-C ports charge via supplied USB-C cables; no separate DC barrel or IEC power connector is present. USB grade listed as usb-2.0 (sufficient for USB audio; exact USB version not explicitly stated in spec sheet but standard for this class of device). The transmitter 3.5mm is confirmed TRS (not TRRS).

ports.name: 3.5mm Input (TX)
ports.note: On each transmitter unit. Accepts external lavalier or microphone with plug-in power. TRS connector.

ports.name: USB-C (TX)
ports.note: On each transmitter unit. Used for charging and firmware updates via RØDE Central.

ports.name: 3.5mm Output (RX)
ports.note: On receiver unit. Analog stereo/dual-mono output to camera or recording device.

ports.name: USB-C (RX)
ports.note: On receiver unit. Provides digital audio (24-bit/48kHz USB audio interface) to computers and mobile devices, and also charges the unit.
